chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 35 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.01.2026 For orders on MA 144/26 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 145/26 For hearing of main case Mr. Imam Ali Hajano, Advocate along with applicants 1. Urgent granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicants Inam Ali, Muhammad Umar and Muhammad Afzal are nominated as accused in Crime No. 154 of 2025 registered at Police Station Satellite Town Mirpurkhas under Sections 302, 324, 447, 148, 149, 506(ii) & 504 PPC. Learned counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicants due to malafide intentions; and, that the applicants being law abiding citizens wish to face trial; however, they are apprehensive that before reaching trial court they might be arrested, humiliated and disgraced. They therefore seek legal shelter. Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicants are admitted to protective bail for a period of seven days subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees Ten Thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In case, the applicants fail to appear before the concerned court within the stipulated period the surety amount shall be forfeited. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days i.e. 20.01.2026 or when the applicants surrender themselves before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
